name: Undercover Detectives Stake Out a Mysterious House

chat_messages.text: write a 3 sentence synopsis for this screenplay

attachments.extracted_content:
Created using Celtx
EXT. OUTSIDE OF HOUSE - NIGHT
Isolated house in quiet neighborhood, our attention is on the
car parked discreetly away from the street lights.
Two under cover detectives sit in a car in mid conversation.
TERRY
Have you ever been to one of these
things?.... Diana?
DIANA
2008. Columbus Ohio. I worked
undercover at an illegal brothel. we
recovered 80 guns, 120 pounds of
cocaine, 56 pounds of heroine, rescued
47 women from sex trafficking and put
20 assholes behind bars, 3 assholes in
the ground.
TERRY
Wait... What did you--
DIANA
I put 3 ass holes in the ground. Focus
on the mission.
TERRY
Im tryin! So is it gonna be like an
orgy? What if they expect us to
perform sex in front of --
DIANA
(cuts in) Perform sex? What are you
talking about. TERRY. Get your head in
the game.
TERRY
Im Trynnn! Its just like - a big grey
area, ya know and I dont want to do
anything to make YOU uncomfortable or
like anything that would get back to
HR-
DIANA
(laughing) Stop being a PUSSY.
(serious) We are here. We are going to
stop these murderous ass holes. Put
them behind bars or introduce them to
their maker. Do what you have to.

2.
Created using Celtx
TERRY
Im SURE. You know ALLL about tha--
WACkkkk! Diana delivers a disciplinary punch to terry's face.
TERRY
ooof - oww sor--
DIANA
Put your Mask on. Its time to get into
Character.
EXT./INT. FRONT DOOR - NIGHT
Front Door outside of house.
Door bell rings and promptly answered by a man and woman,
with eccentric masks framing huge welcoming smiles.
DAMON
(with exuberant energy) MY FRIENDS!
Welcome! A night of unparalleled
experiences awaits you!
The eccentric couple take turns kissing them on both cheeks.
when Desiree gets to Terry she thrusts him into her waist
while firmly groping his ass. Never breaking eye contact.
DESIREE
haha MMMhmmmm AN honor...
DIANA
(smiling) The honor is all ours
TERRY
Ye-ahh await us-- Cant wait to see
what awaits!
Desiree and Damon share an amused smile. Desiree holds out
her arm to Terry, and Damon to Diana.
DESIREE
Relax my Darling, all in time. COME.
The rest of our guests await.
INT. HOUSE - NIGHT
Well lit foyer, there are 4 masked individuals in mid
conversation.
Laugher erupts from the group.

3.
Created using Celtx
An overly tipsy Emily is telling an embarrassing story about
her husband Robert, while Robert slightly back from the group
is shaking his head embarrassed trying to disappear behind
his hand.
EMILY
....Robert is new to this. in my last
marriage Jason and I hosted parties
like this ALL the time.
JAZMINE
Robert you're so like innocent.
EMILY
I was finally able to get Robert into
this 2 months ago, and on his first
time, he forgot his safe word.
JAZMINE
Gasps (with delite)
EMILY
Robert couldn't walk for two weeks
and---
Damon, Desiree, Terry and Diana walk into the dining room.
Damon and Diana's arms are locked.
(Emily motions to Terry) oooOO I
remember you grrrr
Terry smiles awkwardly and waves.
Jazmine pulls out her phone to take a selfie. Damon is taken
out of the moment and quickly gets up to walk towards
Jasmine.
DAMON
My Dear Jazmine, did you not concur to
our arrangement?
JAZMINE
Hmmmmmm?
DAMON
The possession of cell phones is
strictly prohibited, I'm afraid I must
dispose of this...TEMPORARILY of
course.

4.
Created using Celtx
Damon snatches the phone from Jazmine. Jazmine looks pissed,
Ricky intervenes before she could react.
JAZMINE
Seriously?! I promised this designer
that I would get a video in this
dress.
RICKY
It's all good doll. We can get
pictures later. Let's just enjoy
tonight.
Desiree moves to pull Damon away from Ricky and Jazmine.
Damon drops Jazmine's phone into a trash can. Everyone is
unaware.
INT. HOUSE DINING ROOM - NIGHT
SFX: DING DING DING
All members of the party sit at a well dressed dining table
with food. Desiree and Damon sit at the very end. The couples
converse, and drink wine.
DAMON
Behind these masks, we shed our
facades. Here, we embrace the darkness
that resides within. Tonight, we
experience the forbidden.
The guests raise their glasses, intrigued by Damon's words.
Desiree, elegant and mysterious in her gown, moves gracefully
by his side.
DESIREE
To the mysteries that bind us, and the
experiences that await.
DAMON
And NOW.. introductions
Everyone looks attentively at Damon and Desiree and begin to
introduce themselves. Brief expressions of curiosity and
apprehension.
EMILY
I'm Emily and this is Robert.

5.
Created using Celtx
ROBERT
Hi there.
RICKY
I'm Ricky and this is my girl Jazmine.
Jazmine blows kisses at the group.
Damon motions to Terry and Diana, who look a bit
apprehensive.
DAMON
And you are?
TERRY
umm TERR-
Terribly sorry that we are crashing
this party.
DAMON
mhmm?
Diana glares at Terry sternly
DIANA
I'm Mary and this is my husband Joel.
Damon and Desiree look at asuspiciously
EMILY
We had wonderful evening with them
last night ,right after the crypto
influencers party. I promise y'all are
in for a treat.
Emily grazes Terry's shoulder, and he winces.
JAZMINE
(sighing loudly) I guess we're just
supposed to sit here and, like, talk
to each other or whatever..
Damon takes a deep breath and composes hisself.
ROBERT
You look lovely tonight Mary Im- glad
you--- (Emily cuts in)
EMILY
(drunkenly) Oh ROBERTTT You're so

6.
Created using Celtx
sweet.
EMILY
I'm sure our new friends would love to
hear more about our adventures with
Mary
Emily takes a sip of her wine.
Don't worry everyone its a very VERY
short story..
Laughter erupts. Robert is fuming while Diana is trying to
disappear.
ROBERT
Go ahead Emily! Why don't you tell
everyone another funny story about me?
Seems to be your specialty tonight!
EMILY
(takes sip from glass) of course dear
don't mind if I--
RICKY
Hey man dont sweat it! I got some tips
for ya later tonight to help you last
longer. We'll get you going all night!
Emily is staring very suggestively at Terry. He feels a foot
touch his foot under the table, he jumps slightly.
TERRY
(flustered) Whoa, let's uh, maybe
change topics here..
DAMON
No need for that! Let us enjoy this
delectable meal before we partake in
more tantalizing conversation.
DESIREE
Yes, dinner first, pleasure later. Do
pace yourselves, we have all night!
Jasmine takes off her mask.
Damon's jaw drops, he is fuming with blind rage.

7.
Created using Celtx
DAMON
JAZMINE! Do you think you're above
this occasion?
RICKY
Damon don't talk to my girl like that.
Damon reacts to Ricky's with a killer glare and heavy
breathing.
Desiree approaches Damon.
DESIREE
(whispers in pig latin) Otnyay etyay
ymay earday..
ALT LINE: (whispers) Not yet my dear.
Terry and Diana share a look of suspicion and concern.
JAZMINE
Wait what's not yet?
Camera cuts to Damon and Desiree holding each other lovingly.
INT. HOUSE DINING ROOM - MOMENTS LATER
RICKY
(burps loudly)
DAMON
(composing himself) Let us move on to
dessert, shall we? I believe you will
find it simply to DIE for.. (whispers
in French to Desiree)
(translation:"that annoying bitch dies
first")
Damon Smiles smugly to his guests
JAZMINE
Annoying bitch?! My 3.2 million tiktok
followers says otherwise!
EMILY
You know (takes a big gulp of wine)
fair warning, Robert is lactose

8.
Created using Celtx
intolerant.
Desiree makes her way to the kitchen, where she doses two of
the desserts with a sedative.
(CONTINUED)
Have you ever heard the O Fortuna with
just the horns- that's Robert that's
how he sounds
Desiree hand out the desserts. Robert looks down at the
dessert in front of him in disgust
ROBERT
I can't eat this. There's peanuts.
DESIREE
We'll make another one sweetie!
JAZMINE
It's fine! We can switch.
Jazmine swaps plates with Robert.
Ricky swaps plates with Emily. Damon looks concerned. He
walks over to Robert, to grab his plate.
DAMON
We insist. We'll make you another-
ROBERT
No! This is my decision. I'm gonna eat
this cake. With this fork. And I'm not
switching anything else tonight.
EMILY
ooo I haven't seen this side of Robert
before...
Robert quickly eats his new cake in defiance to Damon.The
couple looks at each other in solidarity.
DAMON
BRAVO! You've revealed your true
nature.
Desiree looks confused but claps in agreement, to follow
Damon's lead. Jazmine and Ricky begins to clap. Damon
encourages everyone to follow

9.
Created using Celtx
DAMON
Yes! Yes! give it up for Robert!
Robert begins to convulse at the mouth.
EMILY
Oh my God! What's wrong baby?
Emily gets up drunkingly and stumbles towards him, but falls
and but stumbles and falls.
Damon and Desiree quickly jump to action.
DAMON
Stay calm everyone! I'll get Robert
upstairs. Desiree, grab the epi pens.
Desiree exits towards another room. Damon takes the dying
guests upstairs. Emily follows behind.
RICKY
Ugh cross contamination...yea that
happens all the time.
JAZMINE
Oh my God, I hope they're alright!
Cut to Terry and Diana knowingly staring across the table.
They are suspicious of what just occurred. Terry winks
awkwardly.
DIANA
Mouths: What?
TERRY
The signal!
JAZMINE
Oh wait! Signal? You have your phone?
Damon!
You hear a door shut behind Damon and Chester.
JAZMINE
ugh. Unfair.
There's an awkward silence between the group.

10.
Created using Celtx
Cut to hallway. Ricky and Jazmine are walking and having a
serious discussion about recent events. Their masks are held
up over their heads.
JAZMINE
Did you see that shit?
RICKY
Yea, but I don't think they, like,
died?
JAZMINE
No, they have an Epi pen. But did you
see that bitch with her phone?
RICKY
Babe, I don't think they had their
phones.
JAZMINE
no they said "signal" dumbass. But
don't worry, I came prepared.
Jasmine pulls out her backup cell phone from her back pocket.
She directs him into the room next to them. They step through
the door and shut it behind them.
INT. BED ROOM - NIGHT
Dark Room. Ricky is beginning to take off his shirt (in the
moon light).
RICKY
OOoooh bout to get busy in here.
JAZMINE
Ummm i hope there is a bed in here.
Jazmine switches on the light.
JAZMINE
(continued) finally
RICKY
Uhhhhhh....
Ricky AND JASMINE sees Desiree seating in room that is
covered in plastic.

11.
Created using Celtx
Damon enters the doorway of the room, with a knife, behind
Jazmine and Ricky.
Damon points a knife at Jazmine.
DAMON
I SAID. No PHONES.
DESIREE
ahtahtaht you little rule breakers.
JAZMINE
I-II-IIehhh.. Joel has his phon...
Door shuts. The scene cuts to black.
INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
Terry and Diana are pacing around having a heated discussion
about recent events.
DIANA
Okay, we gotta save Ricky and Jazmine.
They're idiots, but no one else can
die in this investigation.
Diana is busy searching for something.
TERRY
We don't have guns. Let's go get back
to the car to call for backup.
Let's hope that the other two remain
alive.
Diana finds a gun case and pulls out a a gold gun.
DIANA
I think I have a plan.
Terry looks surprised at Diana's gun.
Jazmine screams from a separate room.
DIANA
Go call for back up.

12.
Created using Celtx
Cut to Terry discovering Jazmine bloody in the hallway. Terry
pulls Jazmine into a separate room to hide.
TERRY
Stay calm. I'm a cop. Is Ricky dead?
JAZMINE
**knods her head yes
TERRY
We're going to get through this. is
any of this your blood?
JAZMINE
mm mm **shakes head no
TERRY
okay, i need you to calm down before
we go outside.
JAZMINE
outside? can't you just call someone?
I saw your phone earlier.
TERRY
I never had a phone.
Jazmine realizes that the room is covered in plastic, and
that Robert and Emily are laying on the floor dead.
Jazmine runs to the door and Terry follows her outside.
Jazmine and Terry find themselves trapped, as Desiree stands
in the doorway behind them and Damon stands outside with a
knife.
DAMON
Pick an exit.
Damon is holding a knife. Jazmine and Terry turn around to
see Desiree holding a bat.
JAZMINE
(frozen in terror) I-I-Iiii...
Terry tries to snap Jazmine out of it, he grabs her hand and
pulls her with him towards Desiree, he dodges a bat swing as
his grip slips, ending up on other side of Desiree. he has no
choice but to run to safety.
Terry looks back in terror. Jazmine had desiree's bat in her

13.
Created using Celtx
chest forcing her backwards where she falls into Damons firm
grasp.
JAZMINE
Plee, ple, mmmm--
DESIREE
Do me a favor darling
JAZMINE
What-
DESIREE
Hold my bat. Hahaha
Desiree tosses the bat at Jazmine. Jazmine holds the bat near
her chest clumsily. Desiree laughs hysterically.
While Terry observes helpless in horror a door is heard
swinging open. Out runs Diana with a Dessert Eagle in hand.
DIANA
GETT DOWWWWWN!
Terry gets up instead.
TERRY
huh?
(gun fires as Diana falls to the ground and drops the gun.)
Damon rushes to the grab the gun, and unloads the bullets on
Diana.
DAMON
(annoyed) I don't like thieves.
Terry gets up to charge Damon, and Desiree hits Terry with
multiple blows with her bat. Terry falls to the ground in
excruciating pain.
Damon walks towards the fireplace to grab the outdoor decor,
a silver letter D.
DAMON
Let me finish him.
Cuts to front doorway, the actors are out of sight. We hear a
loud Ding to imply that Terry was killed by the silver D
object.

Created using Celtx
EXT. OUTSIDE OF HOUSE - NIGHT
We see the front of the house, with focus on the doorway.
We hear a loud ding.
JAZMINE (V.O)
Hey Jazhive, almost died.
Viewers can see that Jazmine is now live on TikTok.
JAZMINE
First of all, RIP Ricky.
Second, fuck masquerades.
Jazmine takes off her mask and throws it on the road.
Third, thank you Vera for this amazing
dress.
@2THICK yes this is blood. Vera I
don't this shit will come out.
Lastly, always bring a back up phone.
Camera zooms out further and further away into the night sky.
End scene.

chat_messages.text:
Here is a 3 sentence synopsis of the screenplay:

An undercover cop duo infiltrates a deadly masquerade party to take down the eccentric hosts, but when their cover is blown and guests start dying, they must fight to survive and expose the truth about the hosts' twisted game before becoming victims themselves.
